$comment: The craft element catalog. status: proven=generalized & registry-ready | todo=shipped on a source site, needs generalizing | superseded | parked. For status=proven, `recipe` is a real file in this repo (elements/<name>/recipe.md). For status=superseded/parked, `recipe` is a historical pointer into the SOURCE build's git history (hingulapuran, bugadi-showpage, etc.) -- it will not resolve as a path in this repo by design; see each entry's `source` field. Harvest one brick at a time (see README).

elements.name: cinematic-scroll-saga
elements.summary: One pinned stage: a 2.5D scene-reel that flows into a guided map tour and closes on a photo. Hard-swap beats (no cross-fade), weighted-timeline pacing.
elements.note: Harvested 2026-06-19. Self-contained (imports ./timeline). Theme-token driven; marker colours are props.

elements.name: preloader-gateway
elements.summary: Cinematic entry: two door leaves part on scroll to reveal a backdrop scene + title. Layered-PNG parallax, reduced-motion safe.
elements.note: Harvested 2026-06-19. Self-contained (react + motion only). Title is static behind the doors — never scroll-opacity it.

elements.name: horizontal-scroll
elements.summary: A row of panels that scrolls sideways while pinned (vertical scroll -> horizontal travel). Deterministic aspect-ratio widths; reduced-motion stack.
elements.note: Harvested 2026-06-19. Self-contained (react + motion). Track width from aspect-ratio (no cold-load bug); tune speed via heightVh.

elements.name: scene-reel-2.5d
elements.note: Folded into cinematic-scroll-saga. Keep as a lighter standalone option if needed.

elements.name: cylinder-carousel
elements.summary: 3D cylindrical carousel — panels on a virtual cylinder, rotates with scroll.
elements.note: Built as a demo, not adopted. Good for a browse/collection view.

elements.name: r3f-3d-hero
elements.summary: R3F neural core — wireframe icosahedron + 2 orbital rings + particle halo, optional pointer-cam. Perf-safe wrapper (lazy ssr:false + IntersectionObserver + weak-device fallback). Colours via props.
elements.note: Harvested 2026-06-19; colours generalized to props, build-verified on command-center. v2 for different geometry.

elements.name: material-shader
elements.summary: Animated 'oxidised metal' background band — fragment shader (simplex fbm + domain warp), base->metal mix + accent glint. Perf-safe wrapper + static fallback. Colours via props.

altSource.note: refraction / bloom / particles variant -> a future v2/sibling

elements.note: Harvested 2026-06-19; colours -> props, build-verified on bugadi. Static fallback derived from colours (self-contained). 3-octave fbm is a perf gate.

elements.name: kinetic-typography
elements.summary: SplitText — splits a line into chars/words and reveals them staggered (rise + rotate) on scroll-in. Accessible (aria-label).

elements.name: reveal
elements.summary: Reveal-on-scroll wrapper — fades + rises children once on viewport enter. Reduced-motion safe. The workhorse for entrance polish.
elements.note: Harvested 2026-06-19 verbatim. Use increasing delay on siblings for staggered groups.

elements.name: custom-cursor
elements.summary: Accent dot + lerp-trailing ring that grows on interactive hover. Fine-pointer only; reduced-motion safe.
elements.note: Harvested 2026-06-19. Colours generalized to CSS vars with fallbacks.

elements.name: hover-image-distortion
elements.summary: RippleImage — liquid ripple on hover via SVG feTurbulence + feDisplacementMap (NO WebGL/three). Any , GPU-composited, heavy-media + reduced-motion safe.
elements.note: Harvested 2026-06-19; removed the desi bg token, added intensity prop. SVG filter, no three.js — corrected the catalog (was tagged WebGL).

elements.name: page-transition-morph
elements.summary: MorphGallery (tile cover morphs via layoutId into a full-screen detail card, and back) + PageWipe (per-route wipe in template.tsx). Reduced-motion safe.
elements.note: Harvested 2026-06-19; gallery items -> props, wipe colours -> class props. Build-verified on photographer. PageWipe goes in app/template.tsx (re-mounts per route).

elements.name: entrance-choreography
elements.summary: Staggered hero entrance + easing comparator (bugadi stage-0 lookbook).
elements.note: Folded into `reveal` — the reusable part is reveal-on-scroll + increasing per-sibling delay. The easing comparator was a demo, not a shippable element.

elements.name: smooth-scroll
elements.summary: Lenis smooth-scroll off the GSAP ticker (ScrollTrigger sync) + anchor smooth-scroll; reduced-motion safe. Foundation many scroll elements assume.
config: mount once near root; no props
elements.note: Harvested 2026-06-19 verbatim. Drop the gsap ticker for a lenis-only lighter variant.

elements.name: microinteractions
elements.summary: Small hover moments. v1 = MagneticButton (eases toward the cursor, springs back). Transform-only, reduced-motion safe, keyboard-reachable.
elements.note: Harvested 2026-06-19 verbatim. Grow with sibling micro-pieces (hover-depth, tilt).

elements.name: ambient-motifs
elements.summary: A field of sparse decorative motifs that fill a section's empty gutters. Each floats on its own AND the whole field leans with the cursor (per-motif depth = parallax). A motif pool rotates per section via `offset` so neighbours never match. Desktop-only, reduced-motion safe.
elements.provenOn: hingulapuran (Sati / Hingul / Brahmarandhra / Parashurama gutters; build-verified)

altSource.note: FloatingMath — the math-glyph field this was generalized from (presets hero/band/header + hover-glow if a richer variant is wanted)

elements.note: Harvested 2026-06-23. Generalized from aa's FloatingMath: colour -> prop, glyphs -> SVG-motif-nodes prop; devotional kalam set baked as default. Mount as first child of a positioned, overflow-hidden section and lift content to relative z-10 (a -z layer hides behind the section bg — the bug we hit).
